description_long: This is a modern single bed with a rectangular frame, featuring a prominent black headboard and matching side rails. The bed is topped with a visible mattress, covered by a colorful comforter in blue, orange, and white geometric patterns. Two small, blocky nightstands are attached or positioned adjacent to each side of the headboard, adding to the urban, functional aesthetic. The frame appears to be constructed from wood or a wood-like material, with a sturdy, low-profile design. The bedding is neatly arranged, and the overall look is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban apartment or compact living space. The bed sits directly on a flat surface, with no visible legs or under-bed storage.
description: A modern single bed with a black frame, colorful geometric comforter, and attached nightstands, designed for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, attached nightstands, and the colorful comforter on the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress and the geometric bedding, with the headboard and nightstands visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the headboard and the length of the bed frame, with bedding visible on top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile of the bed and bedding.
